packageRules.description: Freeze the legacy System.Threading.Channels entries (net6.0=6.x, net8.0=8.x) so they stay aligned with the runtime-bundled assembly. Only the entry for newer TFMs (currently 10.x) is auto-updated.
Freeze the System.Linq.Async entries that aren't on the latest line: the net6.0 entry on 6.x, and the net8.0 entry on 7.0.0. The entry for newer TFMs (currently 7.0.1) continues to be updated.
